title: 29 Undervalued Dividend Aristocrats: December 2023
text: The S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index contains 67 dividend growth stocks called the Dividend Aristocrats.

title: 7 Ever-Rising Dividend Stocks Even a Recession Can't Stop
text: Even in turbulent economic times overlayed with bear markets, recessions, and broader uncertainty, some stocks still manage to provide stability, income, and growth for investors. You should always be on the lookout for companies that can deliver rising dividends year after year.

title: Can Pricing, Demand Shield Church & Dwight (CHD) From Cost Woes?
text: Church & Dwight (CHD) gains on solid consumer demand due to its consistent innovation and acquisitions. This, along with efficient pricing, helps the company amid high SG&A costs.
